sections_patched: 5.1 Subprocess vs SDK vs Direct API
refinement_summary: Removed 5 inline research annotations (Validated via / CRITICAL Validated via / section heading timestamps); rewrote build_worker_cli_command() docstring with canonical pattern and SDK migration path; removed unreachable dead code after return; added stdin delivery design note; cleaned env-handling comment; added Implementation Checklist section surfacing next-steps from research findings.
remaining_concerns: spawn_worker() still opens subprocess without stdin=PIPE — the system_prompt and initial_prompt are built but never delivered to the process. Section 5.5 item 3 flags this for the implementer but the code design gap is not yet resolved in the SD.

build_worker_cli_command() signature now takes no parameters but spawn_worker() still passes model/max_turns that are unused — implementer will need to decide whether to drop those parameters from spawn_worker() or add them to the stream-json stdin delivery.
